steps: Let n = cupcakes made in morning. Afternoon: add 15 → n + 15. Sold 8 → subtract 8 → n + 15 − 8. End of day: 30 left. So equation: n + 15 − 8 = 30. Simplify: n + 7 = 30 → n = 30 − 7 = 23. Check options: A says n + 15 − 8 = 30, n = 23 → matches. B says same equation but n = 37 → wrong. C says n − 15 + 8 = 30, n = 37 → wrong. D says n + 15 + 8 = 30, n = 7 → wrong. E says same equation as A but n = 25 → wrong. Only A is correct.
